description: Title / MG-offset rules for 株式会社一迅社 支払通知書 + 詳細別送の内訳 PDFs.
notes: MD (商品化) rows: raw 差引版権支払額 is after-tax income (税抜). × 1.10 = GT before_tax_income_jpy.
EB (国内電子) rows: same rule — raw amount is 税抜, × 1.10 = GT before_tax_income_jpy.
For MG offsets: rows of the form 'X (3)（MG）' are paired with 'X (3)' and the two are combined (summed).
The merged (sum) becomes the single GT row with channel_title_jp 'X 3' (no volume punctuation).

volume_suffix_rewrite.raw: 義家族に執着されています (3)
volume_suffix_rewrite.gt_title: 義家族に執着されています 3

volume_suffix_rewrite.raw: 捨てられた王女の秘密の寝室（3）
volume_suffix_rewrite.gt_title: 捨てられた王女の秘密の寝室 3
